items.text:
🎶 MARZYSZ O SCENIE? CZAS ZROBIĆ KROK DALEJ! 🎶

Zapraszamy Cię na XIII edycję międzynarodowych warsztatów muzycznych w Mostkach – miejsce, gdzie pasja spotyka profesjonalizm 🔥

🎙️ Wokal: Patrycja Zarychta, Kaja Karaplios
✨ Gość specjalny: Paulina Przybysz

🎹 Akompaniament: Miłosz Oleniecki, Emanuel Ratajczyk
🎼 Instrumenty klawiszowe: Emanuel Ratajczyk
🎸 Gitara: Rafał Panek
🎸 Gitara basowa: Piotr Żaczek
🥁 Perkusja: Gniewomir Tomczyk, Carlos Botello
💃 Ruch sceniczny: Kinga Rolka
🧠 Psychologia głosu/muzyki: Jakub Michniewicz
🌟 + INNI WYJĄTKOWI GOŚCIE!

🌿 Widzimy się w wyjątkowym miejscu
W pięknych okolicznościach przyrody – nad Zalewem Mostki, w ponad 200-letnim dworku, otoczonym lasem 🌲✨
Idealna przestrzeń, żeby tworzyć, odpoczywać i łapać inspirację

👉 Kiedy? 9–14.08.2026
📍 Gdzie? Wiejski Dom Kultury w Mostkach

💸 Koszt:
• 1800 zł – EARLY BIRDS (do 30.05.)
• 2000 zł – cena regularna

🎉 OFERTA SPECJALNA
Przyjedź z kimś bliskim i zgarnijcie –100 zł dla każdego 💥

📝 Zapisy:
📧 muzycznemostki@gmail.com
🌐 www.muzycznemostki.weebly.com

⚡ Nie czekaj – liczba miejsc jest ograniczona!
To nie są zwykłe warsztaty. To doświadczenie, które zmienia podejście do muzyki i sceny.

🎵 Do zobaczenia w Mostkach!

items.previewDescription: Dan De Huis Productions steht für hochwertige Musikproduktion, professionelles Mixing und Mastering mit Fokus auf Rock/Pop, Balladen und EDM. Mit einer Mischung aus analogem Band-Sound und digitaler Präzision bringe ich deinen Song nach Vorne – druckvoll, klar und streaming-ready.

sharedPost.text:
Zum Nachhören 

Fleissige Hörer der Movietime werden sich noch an Roland Düringer erinnern, den es im Frühjahr in Studionähe verschlagen hatte, und daß im Gespräch mit ihm von einem gewissen Herrn Dorfer die Rede war … Nun: DEN hat kürzlich das Schicksal in unsere Reichweite gespült, und da konnten wir uns die Chance natürlich nicht entgehen lassen!

‼️URGENT CASTING CALL FOR STUDENT PROJECT‼️
**‼️CASTING CALL‼️**
(unpaid but can pay for travel if needed)

Hello, I’m a student at Coastland College doing my second year final major project!

Looking for an actor to play the main character in my short film, “**Toppled Choices**”.

**Plot:** The main character is retelling their previous day in therapy. That day, they made choices that led to a bystander's death, littering in the road, and causing a crash.

**(Script for specifics attached)**

**Main character: **Around the **age of 18-22**, no specified gender

**Date filming**: **26th April** + additional discussed date

**Location**: **Wareham**

**Requirements:** **Self-tape**, around the age of **18-22**

Thanks for any interest! Feel free to message or send me an email: **CaitlinFilmTv@outlook.com**

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Komparsen und Kleindarsteller für SWR Montavia Fußballserie in Ludwigsburg gesucht Du bist über 18 Jahre, kommst aus Baden-Württemberg willst vor die Kamera und Fußball st für dich das Größte? Wir suchen Mitspieler und Gegner, Fans, Meckerrentner*innen Waffel Omas und Opas, und Alles was Ihr mit Amateurfußball und Kreisliga verbindet. Meldet Euch mit einem Foto oder einem kurzen Vorstellungsvideo unter: Drehbeginn: Juni 2026 Falls Ihr was am Ball könnt, lasst uns das uuuunbedingt sehen. Erzählt uns Eure schöste teFußballgeschichte. Außerdem bitte Telefonnummer, die Anschrift und das Geburtsdatum angeben. Wir freuen uns auf Eure Nachrichten! Mortania SWR>'

items.text:
望 Horizon
Casting Call

Non union

South Scarborough

Volunteer 

Independent, volunteer film project entitled 望 Horizon, exploring quiet, emotional moments and human connection.

Looking for two male actors (20s–30s) interested in:

 • Collaborative character development

 • Naturalistic, subtle performance

 • Building chemistry on camera

Location: Scarborough Bluffs / South Scarborough (Toronto area)

Note: This is a BL-inspired project, focusing on emotional intimacy between two male characters. There is no nudity or explicit sexual content. 

You don’t need to identify in any particular way—the focus is on acting, presence, and interaction.

Interested? Message this Page with a short introduction and optional photos or clips. 

If you have seen the brilliant Japanese BL entitled More Than Words, then you will understand the kind of vibe I’m looking for. 

I also have a YouTube channel with examples of my exploratory works, which will give you an idea of the production level and tone of my work.

items.text:
AUDITIONS!!!

MURDER FOR TWO by Kellen Blair and Joe Kinosian 

Directed by Kerri Norris for The Royal Canadian Theatre Company

Casting paid, non-union role, 25-40 years old, female presenting, to play THE SUSPECTS. All ethnicities and backgrounds are encouraged to audition. (Please note: the role of Marcus has been cast) 

This role requires a high skill level of piano playing, singing ability and performance. Comedic skills, some dance and ability to improv are assets.This fast paced, 90-minute, musical whodunnit features two actors who act, sing and play the piano throughout. They accompany themselves, each other and sometimes play together. The actor cast as THE SUSPECTS needs a high energy and versatile performance that can switch between the 10 different characters at the drop of a hat. 

Vocal range: Bb3-E5 (as written, but can be transposed)

Grade 9 RCM piano ability for the most difficult passages of music

Rehearsals running August 2nd – September 22nd at The Studio, 10660 City Parkway, Surrey.

(Rehearsals will be Sunday daytime & Tues/Thurs evenings up until show opening. Two additional back-up rehearsals will be scheduled based on cast availability.  Tech week schedule TBD.)

Show runs September/October in Surrey/New Westminster

Surrey: September 25-27 (Dress Rehearsal, Sept 24)
New Westminster: October 2-4 (Dress Rehearsal, Oct 1)
Auditions by electronic submission.  

2 min video recording accompanying yourself singing a comedic song
1 min comedic monologue sample.    
Please also send your headshot and CV with your submission to auditions@rctheatreco.com by May 4th. 

TITLE ALL FILES WITH YOUR NAME!

Local submissions only for this casting call

Callbacks: Saturday, May 9th. (Only those invited to callbacks will be contacted. Those invited will be given a short excerpt from the show to learn, for piano & voice as well as sides from the script.)

items.title: Hi guys,

items.text:
WEEKLY ROUNDUP 🎬

30% of our actors self-taped for one of the UK’s most loved TV soaps.
50+ PAID opportunities dropped into the group.

And one actor…
Asked how to price herself —
…and walked away billing DOUBLE 💰

This is what happens when you’re in the right room.

Actors outside are waiting.
Actors inside are moving.

The ones inside right now?
They’re on fire 🔥

If you’re serious about your acting career…
Stop watching from the outside.

👉 https://www.mzacting.com/matt-zinas-inner-circle.html
👉 https://linktr.ee/mattzina

#actorslife #selftape #actingcareer #ukactors #auditions

items.title: WEEKLY ROUNDUP 🎬

items.text:
Most actors avoid this part of themselves… and it shows on camera.

Truth is — the moment you stop trying to look good and start laying yourself bare, everything changes.
That uncomfortable, messy, “ugly” side? That’s where the truth lives.
And truth is what casting actually buys into.

Vulnerability is the difference between average and the best.

Want to learn to be the best?
See the link in the caption 👉 https://linktr.ee/mattzina

#acting #screenacting #actingtips #actorsmindset #actingcoach

items.text:
Hi everyone in Casting Calls UK! 👋
I’m Robert Essex, an actor and model based in Dallas, Texas, and I wanted to introduce myself and share my updated comp card.
I’m represented overseas by Graham Haynes at INK Models International in Cambridge, and I’m excited to connect with UK casting opportunities in film, TV, commercials, and modelling.
Currently in callbacks for the feature film Top Hitters (a dark comedy shooting here in Dallas), I have a versatile, strong look — perfect for rugged leading roles, confident professionals, tattooed characters, or commercial work. I’m fully prepared to travel and self-tape as needed for UK projects.
Here’s my latest comp card:
[Attach both images — the main black & white shot and the collage showing your range]
Quick stats:
•  Height: 6’0” (183 cm)
•  Chest: 42”
•  Waist: 32”
•  Suit: 42R
•  Shoes: 10
•  Hair: Brown
•  Eyes: Hazel
I’m professional, reliable, and always ready to bring energy to set. Open to any UK-based projects or international co-productions.
If you’re a casting director, producer, or fellow actor, feel free to reach out, save my details, or say hello — I’d love to connect and explore opportunities across the pond!
Looking forward to working together soon.
Best regards,
Robert Essex
📧 robertessex17@gmail.com
📸 Instagram: @rob_essex17
Represented overseas by Graham Haynes at INK Models International (Cambridge)
#CastingCallsUK #UKCasting #Actor #Model #USActor #InternationalTalent #CompCard #FeatureFilm

sharedPost.text:
📣📣CASTING📣📣

Zapraszamy na dwuetapowy casting, z pierwszym etapem online! Szukamy aktorki w wieku 18+ do zagrania w spektaklu - bajce kurdyjskiej na podstawie książki "Opowieści Dengbeżów. Baśnie i bajki kurdyjskie". Mile widziane są umiejętności animacji, gdyż w spektaklu wykorzystamy animację lalką.

Premiera spektaklu jest planowana na początek czerwca, próby do spektaklu w maju w weekendy oraz w trakcie majówki w Zamościu (woj. lubelskie) oraz Kielcach (woj. świętokrzyskie), stąd wymagamy dostępności w tym okresie.

Eksploatację spektaklu planujemy w lato 2026 w trakcie festiwali (m.in. Pol'and'Rock Festiwal w Strefie Warsztatów ASP) dlatego dostępność w czerwcu, lipcu i sierpniu również jest dla nas ważna.

📣📣 Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać na maila: fundacjabanina@gmail.com 📣📣

Zgłoszenie musi zawierać: 
✅ twoje CV
✅ wizytówkę, w formie linku do YouTube

❗Zgłoszenia przyjmujemy do 23 kwietnia❗

Casting może się przedłużyć, w przypadku gdy w wyznaczonym czasie nie znajdziemy odpowiedniej osoby.

O zakończeniu castingu poinformujemy na naszych social mediach tj. Facebook i Instagram

items.text:
THE OFFER 🎬

Some tests don’t come with instructions.
Some decisions are made when no one is watching.

A stranger hands over a bag filled with value… no questions, no explanation.
Just one task — deliver it.

But on the journey, temptation speaks louder than purpose.
Take it. Keep it. No one will know.

And in that quiet moment…

character is revealed.

I chose to deliver it.

Only to discover…
the person I was delivering to…
was the same person who gave it to me.

Not everything is about the reward.
Some journeys are designed to test who you are when silence is your only witness.

“Character is tested in silence.”

Would you keep it… or deliver it?

🎥 Directed by Zakkariyah_direct_it
@micheal_okotie (actor)
@francis___ (assistant director / cinematographer)
@fiyin___ (assistant cinematographer)

items.text:
Today, on my birthday, I chose to make it peaceful.

♾️ FASHION FROM WASTE

A fashion show in the world's most polluted places.
Clothes made from waste. A runway made from garbage. An endless corridor of what we leave behind.

10 countries. 10 models. 10 truths:
🇮🇳 India 🇬🇭 Ghana 🌊 Pacific Ocean
🇮🇩 Indonesia 🇦🇫 Afghanistan 🇰🇪 Kenya
🇵🇭 Philippines 🇪🇬 Egypt 🇧🇩 Bangladesh 🇧🇷 Brazil

Every frame hyperreal. Every detail sharp.
Because the truth deserves no blur.

This is not fashion. This is a mirror.

Let the infinity stop. ∞

#FashionFromWaste #EndlessWaste #WearTheTruth #FashionForThePlanet #BirthdayForEarth

@natgeo @unitednations @greenpeace @patagonia @ellenmacarthurfoundation

sharedPost.text:
🎬 SODIES KASI TV: THE "FOUNDING 40" RECRUITMENT 🎬

Meadowlands, it’s time to tell our own stories. We are building a media empire from the ground up, and we are looking for the hungry, the disciplined, and the visionaries to join us.

THE REALITY CHECK: We are a 100% grassroots startup. We are starting from scratch with:
❌ NO Tools/Equipment (We use our smartphones)
❌ NO Budget/Salary (We work for credits, experience, and growth)
❌ NO Physical Building (The streets of Meadowlands are our studio)

WHO WE NEED:

🎭 ACTORS (Leads & Extras)

Requirements: High discipline, emotional range, and commitment to the "2-on-2-off" schedule. No ego—just talent.

🔊 SOUND & TECHNICAL CREW

Requirements: An ear for detail. Must own a smartphone with storage space to help capture clear audio and shots.

✍️ SCREENWRITERS & CREATIVES

Requirements: Must love Kasi stories and be able to write scripts for local locations.

🏃 PRODUCTION ASSISTANTS (Hustlers)

Requirements: Punctual, organized, and ready to manage the set. If you are 5 minutes early, you are late!

WHY JOIN?
Build a professional portfolio, get listed in our "Green Book" Master Register, and be part of the crew that puts Meadowlands on the global map.

READY TO HUSTLE? APPLY NOW:
👉 https://form.svhrt.com/69b5fc522ac0ef04c5970eab

Casting call!!
Title: Love Thy Neighbor

Shooting: June 18th-June 21st in Savannah, GA

Student film for SCAD, not paid, nonunion 

If interested please go to sophiadarlingcasting.com or email Sophiadarling.casting@gmail.com with your headshot, resume, and what role you are interested in.   PLEASE READ NOTES FOR CHARACTERS

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Love Thy Neighbor Scott Myers Lead. Mixed, Woman, 28-36. A female attorney (and cannibal) with contempt for those who belittle her finds justice through consummation of her perceived aggressors. On paper, a sociopath, her desires for power and justice, sly nature, and impatience causes friction among strangers. Note: The character does handle firearm that is going to be a practical prop. A certified armorer will be present whenever the prop IS. Will be shown smoking a cigarette and will be done practically using herbal cigarettes.'

May be an image of text that says 'Love Thy Neighbor Lainey Supporting. White, Woman, 20-25 Scott's client's niece, who was responsible for hiring Scott to represent her Uncle Nick. Caught in the middle the misunderstanding Lainey's concerned nature leads her to mix in with Scott's and her uncle's affairs. of Note: Will be in a scene with a firearm which will be a practical prop. A certified armorer will be present whenever the pr is.'

May be an image of text that says 'Love LoveThyNeighbor Thy Neighbor Nicholas Burton Day Player. White, Male, 55-65. Scott's client, presumably a frequent offender. A "particular man" as his niece describes him, includes particularities of brashness, sexism, and intolerance for strangers. A "Don't Tread on Me" mentality. He iS casualty of Scott's murderous cannibalism. His desire is to have the upper hand and sovereignty leads to his downfall. Note: The character does handle a firearm that is going to be practical prop. A certified armorer will be present whenever the prop is.'

items.text:
Hi, my name is Megan Jenkins, and my partner is called Oscar Smith we are both looking for a young actor ages 16-17(a boy) who are local to Manchester to play a role in our student film.

We will be filming from the 28th-20th may 

We will be paying for food and transport.

Logline- When a quiet high‑school girl is found dead, her former friend haunted by their broken relationship joins the lead investigator to uncover the truth, only to reveal the terrifying murder that had happened.

The role

Liam: Liam is tall and brunette, Liam speaks with confidence and has a very big ego, when speaking to Emily he is excited and can let the confident facade fall he’s happy and giggly.

If you would like to audition or want more details, please email [meganmjenkins2009@gmail.com](mailto:meganmjenkins2009@gmail.com) and I will send you a section of the script.

Kind regards, Megan and Oscar

Seeking two actors F (45-60) and M (35-40) - amateur, non professional, semi pro etc. fine - in Stroud area for Rehearsed Reads for a Fringe production running this summer in L&SW. Half day (3.5 hour) sessions to run wc 27 April-8 April (likely x2), £30 per session. Fun acting practice and workshopping with the writer (me). 💫

We've cast the play, but will be opportunity for future performances if you're a good fit.  🤩

Any interest please DM me or email perilofyouthplay@gmail.com

Casting Call, Familie für Social Media Werbedreh (Berlin)
Wir suchen eine echte Familie für einen entspannten Social Media Dreh für ein Brettspiel.

‍‍‍ Gesucht:

2 Elternteile (ca. 45+)

2 Teenager (ca. 13–19, idealerweise 1x männlich / 1x weiblich)

Gerne eine echte Familie (kein Muss)

Projekt:

Social Media Werbung für ein Brettspiel

Lockere Szenen beim gemeinsamen Spielen (keine Schauspielerfahrung nötig)

Dreh:

Donnerstag, 23.04.

14:30 – ca. 18:00 (ca. 3,5 Stunden)

Berlin

️ Voraussetzung:

Deutschkenntnisse mindestens C1 oder Muttersprache

Vergütung:

70€ pro Person (Pauschale)

Anmeldung Erfolg durch die Adag

✨ Wichtig:

Keine Schauspielerfahrung nötig

Natürliche, authentische Ausstrahlung

Spaß am gemeinsamen Spielen

Bewerbung: Bitte schickt:

Kurze Vorstellung

Aktuelle Fotos von euch als Familie

Optional: kurzes Video

RARE OPENING: ALTO 1 or SOPRANO 2 or MEZZO. 
NH/ME SEACOAST

Did you maybe sing a cappella back in school? And now you kinda miss it? Or perhaps you wanna try something new. We're Tuckermans at 9, Seacoast NH's longest-running contemporary a cappella group (since 2004). Our voicing is soprano, alto 1, alto 2, tenor, bass, and vocal percussion... one singer per part. And we anticipate an opening for an alto 1 or soprano 2. 

Can you read music enough to learn your vocal part between rehearsals? (Demon-speed sight-reading NOT required.) Can your hold your part on your own? We'd love to hear from you! Or maybe someone you know. 

Alto 1 or Soprano 2... message us asap!

**Casting: LA area locals.  ****Seeking families and friends to be contestants on a fun, family friendly game show. **

** **

A major brand is currently looking for fun, outgoing and excitable families and friends to be contestants on a gameshow shooting 30 minutes outside of downtown Los Angeles.  

All teams must be able to self-report to the location and be available on May 4th and potentially May 5th.

Teams must consist of at least two people and no more than five.  All scenarios are welcome. Families with children between 6 to 12 years old are encouraged to apply.  Participants will be eligible to win various prizes.

To submit, please email a note about your team along with a photo of everyone on the team as well as a telephone number and email address so we can reach out to you to make a brief 1-to-2-minute audition tape.  

Please email [ ](mailto:drivethrusurprise@gmail.com)[factcasting@gmail.com](mailto:factcasting@gmail.com)

items.text:
CASTING CALL – DOCUMENTARY FILM (LOS ANGELES)

Independent documentary film casting real people for an international festival project.

This film explores the experience of living “in between” — the phase between who you were and who you are trying to become. The project is built around themes of transformation, identity, dual life, and the emotional cost of pursuing a dream.

WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR:
 • Actors, performers, and creatives based in Los Angeles
 • Age range: 25–80
 • All genders and backgrounds welcome

We are looking for individuals who are currently living in an “in-between” phase of life:
 • balancing artistic ambition with survival work
 • navigating uncertainty, reinvention, or long-term pursuit of a dream
 • experiencing a gap between expectation and reality

This is not about acting performance — we are looking for real stories, presence, and authenticity.

PROJECT DETAILS:
 • Independent festival-driven documentary film
 • The project already has press coverage, with further media exposure planned
 • Intended for international festival circuit and press distribution

COMPENSATION:

This is a paid project. Compensation will be discussed individually depending on participation and scope.

HOW TO APPLY:

Please send:
 • A short self-tape (1–2 minutes) introducing yourself
 • A brief description of your story

Include:
 • Name
 • Age range
 • Location
 • Current occupation

Email: casting@vorion.studio

NOTE:

This is a selective documentary project. Only selected participants will be contacted.

**BACKGROUND CASTING CALL FOR "JEWFACE" A SHORT FILM BY MELISSA CENTER:**

*A film centered around Jewish Identity is seeking BACKGROUND PERFORMERS. Copy, credit, and meals provided. Please email a headshot and one fun fact about yourself to HELLO@PINKAMONGMEN.COM.*

*We are so grateful for your interest and can't wait to hear from you!*

**BAT MITZVAH ATTENDEES:**

- SEEKING BOYS AND GIRLS AGES 11-15 FOR A 1997 BAT MITZVAH SCENE IN A JEWISH THEMED FILM, FILMS ON THURSDAY 4/16 IN THE EAST VILLAGE. ADDRESS & SHOOT TIMES PROVIDED UPON CONFIRMATION. MUST ARRIVE HAIR & MAKEUP READY WITH 90S LIKE WARDROBE (TEAM WILL PROVIDE GUIDANCE)

- SEEKING ADULTS + RELATIVES, MEN AND WOMEN AGES 20 - 60S FOR A 1997 BAT MITZVAH SCENE IN A JEWISH THEMED FILM, FILMS ON THURSDAY 4/16 IN THE EAST VILLAGE. ADDRESS & SHOOT TIMES PROVIDED UPON CONFIRMATION. MUST ARRIVE HAIR & MAKEUP READY WITH 90S LIKE WARDROBE (TEAM WILL PROVIDE GUIDANCE)

**SOFTBALL CAMP GOERS:**

**- **SEEKING GIRLS AGES 15 - 18, OR 18 TO PLAY YOUNGER FOR A JEWISH SUMMER CAMP SOFTBALL SCENE THAT TAKES PLACE IN THE YEAR 2000. FILMS IN MAPLEWOOD, NEW JERSEY, ON SATURDAY 4/18. ADDRESS & SHOOT TIMES PROVIDED UPON CONFIRMATION. MUST ARRIVE HAIR & MAKEUP + WARDROBE READY (YEAR 2000 WARDROBE)

**NYC STREET PASSERBYS:**

- QUEER, BIPOC INDIVIDUALS AND COUPLES. Ages 20s- 40s and 60-70s, FILMS ON FRIDAY 4/17 IN BROOKLYN HEIGHTS. ADDRESS & SHOOT TIMES PROVIDED UPON CONFIRMATION. MUST ARRIVE HAIR & MAKEUP + WARDROBE READY (PRESENT DAY WARDROBE - TEAM WILL PROVIDE GUIDANCE )

- OLD JEWISH MAN: 80’S, FILMS ON FRIDAY 4/17 IN BROOKLYN HEIGHTS. ADDRESS & SHOOT TIMES PROVIDED UPON CONFIRMATION. MUST ARRIVE HAIR & MAKEUP + WARDROBE READY (PRESENT DAY WARDROBE - TEAM WILL PROVIDE GUIDANCE)

-BOUGIE ASIAN INDIVIDUALS AND COUPLES. AGES 30S-40S. FILMS ON FRIDAY 4/17 IN BROOKLYN HEIGHTS. ADDRESS & SHOOT TIMES PROVIDED UPON CONFIRMATION. MUST ARRIVE HAIR & MAKEUP + WARDROBE READY (PRESENT DAY WARDROBE - TEAM WILL PROVIDE GUIDANCE)

-ARAB-LOOKING MAN: FILMS ON FRIDAY 4/17 IN BROOKLYN HEIGHTS. ADDRESS & SHOOT TIMES PROVIDED UPON CONFIRMATION. MUST ARRIVE HAIR & MAKEUP + WARDROBE READY (PRESENT DAY WARDROBE - TEAM WILL PROVIDE GUIDANCE)

-TOUGH-LOOKING MAN: FILMS ON FRIDAY 4/17 IN BROOKLYN HEIGHTS. ADDRESS & SHOOT TIMES PROVIDED UPON CONFIRMATION. MUST ARRIVE HAIR & MAKEUP + WARDROBE READY (PRESENT DAY WARDROBE- TEAM WILL PROVIDE GUIDANCE)

-PASSERBY #1: FILMS ON FRIDAY 4/17 IN BROOKLYN HEIGHTS. ADDRESS & SHOOT TIMES PROVIDED UPON CONFIRMATION. MUST ARRIVE HAIR & MAKEUP + WARDROBE READY (PRESENT DAY WARDROBE - TEAM WILL PROVIDE GUIDANCE)

-GORGEOUS WOMAN: FILMS ON FRIDAY 4/17 IN BROOKLYN HEIGHTS. ADDRESS & SHOOT TIMES PROVIDED UPON CONFIRMATION. MUST ARRIVE HAIR & MAKEUP + WARDROBE READY (PRESENT DAY WARDROBE - TEAM WILL PROVIDE GUIDANCE)

items.text:
望 Horizon
Casting Call

Non union

South Scarborough

Volunteer 

Independent, volunteer film project entitled 望 Horizon, exploring quiet, emotional moments and human connection.

Looking for two male actors (20s–30s) interested in:

 • Collaborative character development

 • Naturalistic, subtle performance

 • Building chemistry on camera

Location: Scarborough Bluffs / South Scarborough (Toronto area)

Note: This is a BL-inspired project, focusing on emotional intimacy between two male characters. There is no nudity or explicit sexual content. 

You don’t need to identify in any particular way—the focus is on acting, presence, and interaction.

Interested? Message this Page with a short introduction and optional photos or clips. 

If you have seen the brilliant Japanese BL entitled More Than Words, then you will understand the kind of vibe I’m looking for. 

I also have a YouTube channel with examples of my exploratory works, which will give you an idea of the production level and tone of my work.

I'm doing a 2-day workshop at Makers' House in Hastings for people who want to develop a comedy character for the stage.
If you know anyone who would be interested, send 'em my way...

Workshop is May 6th and 7th, and I'm doing a Marcel performance the night of May 5th.

Details here:
https://www.makershousehastings.co.uk/allevents/p/character-in-comedy-with-alexis-dubus-5th-7th-may

items.text:
Auditions for The Spitfire Grill
Auditions!!!

The Spitfire Grill-The Musical

Music and Book by James Valcq 

Lyrics and Book by Fred Alley

Directed by Ella Wyatt

Monday, April 27 @ 7pm

Callbacks: by invitation Wednesday, April 29 @ 7pm

Synopsis:

The musical depicts the journey of a young woman just released from prison, who decides to start her life anew in a rural town in Wisconsin. She participates in a journey within the town toward its own tenuous reawakening.

Please prepare a song of your choice, an accompanist will be provided. 32 bars

Bring a headshot and resume and be ready to list ALL conflicts.

Music and Book by James Valcq 

Lyrics and Book by Fred Alley

Directed by Ella Wyatt

Monday, April 27 @ 7pm

items.text:
Thinking about getting into voiceover but not based in Dublin?
We’re often asked about online options by people living in remote areas or those who simply can’t make it to an in-person class. So this June, we’re opening up our Online Introduction to Voiceover with PBL Voiceover Coach. Ireland's most highly rated Voiceover Coach. 

This affordable session is designed to give you a real, honest impression of what it takes to work in professional voiceover. No fluff, just practical insight, guided exercises, and direction from an industry professional.

What you’ll get:

A clear understanding of how the voiceover industry works

Live coaching and performance feedback

Tips on script interpretation and delivery

Insight into recording setups and audio quality

A chance to ask questions and get personalised guidance

If you have a USB microphone, great, it’ll help you get even more out of the session. But it’s not essential. You can still take part and learn a huge amount without one.

Places are deliberately kept very limited to ensure everyone gets proper attention and feedback.

If you’ve been curious about voiceover, this is your chance to step in and try it properly.

Book your place now:

https://pbl-dmd-events.indiestand.com/products/online-introduction-to-voiceover-class-with-pbl-voiceover-coach/

items.text:
CASTING CALL: PAID SHORT FILM
We are currently casting for a Canada Council / BC Arts Council-funded short film set for production in late May. Details below!

**LOGLINE**: On her final shift at her family’s struggling business, a young woman grapples with mounting guilt as she prepares to leave for university, knowing it will mean leaving her immigrant parents behind.

**PRODUCTION DATES**: Tuesday, May 19th - Sunday, May 24th, 2026

**RATES**: $200 per day

Both **UNION AND NON-UNION** encouraged to submit!

We are looking for the following characters:

**MAMAN** (45-70's): Persian. Native Farsi speaker.

Maman is a sharp, no-nonsense mother who is practical, blunt, and often unintentionally funny. Beneath it all is someone who has sacrificed deeply and holds everything together, expressing her love through control, criticism, and constant caretaking.

**BABA** (45-70's): Persian. Native Farsi speaker. Aloof, kind, often in his own world.

Baba is a gentle, soft-spoken man who was once educated and respected but has quietly let that life go. He is polite and peacekeeping, with a quiet dignity shaped by sacrifice, and only pushes back when he has to.

**Please submit your materials to eastvancasting@gmail.com**

Thank you!

items.text:
## **CASTING CALL: BACKGROUND PERFORMERS (PAID* - Non union) 🎬**

We are looking for various background roles for an upcoming vertical production filming in **Richmond** **on April 21st, 2026.**

**❗️Please read the requirements carefully before applying.**
* **POLICE OFFICER:** Male, age: 20s–40s
* **REPORTER / VINTAGE CROWD:** Male, age: 18+
* **SHAREHOLDER:** Male, age: 20s–40s
* **BOXER:** Male, age: 20s. Must have an athletic/fit build.
* **REFEREE:** Male, age: 20s–40s
* **CEO:** Male, age: 30s 
**HOW TO APPLY:**

Please send me a **Direct Message** on Facebook with the following:
1. The **role** you are applying for.
2. A **recent**, clear photo of yourself.
3. Confirmation that you are free for the **full day** on the 21st of April. (Must have **full-day availability**. While you likely won’t be needed for the entire day, we require a flexible schedule to accommodate production timing.) ***RATE:** $100 for a 5 hours

Thank you!

I sent you a message last night

items.text:
WEEKLY ROUNDUP 🎬

30% of our actors self-taped for one of the UK’s most loved TV soaps.
50+ PAID opportunities dropped into the group.

And one actor…
Asked how to price herself —
…and walked away billing DOUBLE 💰

This is what happens when you’re in the right room.

Actors outside are waiting.
Actors inside are moving.

The ones inside right now?
They’re on fire 🔥

If you’re serious about your acting career…
Stop watching from the outside.

👉 https://www.mzacting.com/matt-zinas-inner-circle.html
👉 https://linktr.ee/mattzina

#actorslife #selftape #actingcareer #ukactors #auditions

items.text:
CASTING CALL

For the forthcoming stage play

BREXITUS NEXITUS
A dark comedy set in Roman times with strikingly modern themes

Brexitus Nexitus takes a light-hearted yet biting look at whether Britain has really changed since the Roman occupation.
Spoiler alert: it hasn’t.

ROLES AVAILABLE

DIRECTOR

If you have the energy and vision to direct and assist cast a great play please apply

Seeking male/ female performers aged 25+ for the following characters:

POTUS 
 A corrupt and self - serving governor of much of Britain, distinguished by his obese stature, elaborate wig, orange complexion, fake blood capsule, ear bandage, bruised and bandaged hands, socks covering swollen ankles and a nappy…

FLOTUS
A bored, frustrated psychopathic wife of Governor Potus 

AGRIPPA
A dim but ambitious Roman general

MAXIMUS 
A scheming civil servant and the secret head of Intelligence.

HONORIOUS 
A shipwrecked missionary destined to become King Arthur.

The WITCH 
A spiritual, wise woman with a fondness for random poisoning.

PERFORMANCE DETAILS
📍 Hope Street Theatre, Liverpool

📅 2nd, 3rd & 4th July 2026

IMPORTANT INFORMATION
This is a profit-share production
Applicants must be local to Liverpool
Only suitable applicants will be contacted

HOW TO APPLY

Please DM Ian MacDonald  with your showreel(s) if available

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'DIRECTOR AND ACTORS WANTED FOR FORTHCOMING PLAY BREXITUS NEXITUS BEPART BE PART OF AN ΕΡΙΣ STORY OF POLITICS, POWER AND ABSURDITY! NO EXPERIENCE NECESSARY-JUS'

topComments.text: That sounds hysterical - good luck with it.

Plan Filmowy, Nowy serial kryminalny 
WARSZAWA, Wynagrodzenie 110 PLN NETTO (po planie) 
Daty 
24.04 Technik kryminalny, policjanci
25.04 Ratownicy, Pacjenci, Personel,Odwiedzajacy

Zgloszenia: PAULINA@SCENERIA.COM.PL dopisek GM + DATA 
Prosze o dane, aktualne zdjecie, gdzie dobrze widoczna jest twarz o sylwetka.

Kamed Studio Warszawa 

​🎬 POSZUKIWANY DUBLER DŁONI ( MĘŻCZYZNA) 🎬

​Szukamy PANÓW  z zadbanymi dłońmi do nagrań w serialu. 
 DŁONIE PODOBNE DO TYCH NA ZDJĘCIU PODGLĄDOWYM

📌 ​Termin: 24.04 (piątek)

📌 ​Stawka: 160 zł (płatne od razu po planie!)

​Jak się zgłosić?

Wyślij e-mail na adres: marlena.kamedstudio@gmail.com
​W tytule: Dłonie

​W treści: Załącz wyraźne zdjęcia dłoni oraz sylwetki  (wierzch i wnętrze) oraz numer telefonu.

#pilne #płatne DOMÓWKA SENIORÓW  

Cześć! Do sesji promocyjnej w klimacie imprezy na działce szukam energicznych i oryginalnych seniorów.

Zdjęcia 18.04 (jutro), godziny 10-15:30 - Warszawa

Poszukiwane role (60+):
1. Senior statysta - stawka 150 zł
Rola: Członek klubu seniorów. Otwarty i rozrywkowy, bierze aktywny udział w imprezie w ogrodzie.

Opłacamy wyżywienie i ewentualne koszty transportu.

Zainteresowanych proszę o zgłoszenia w wiadomościach prywatnych z:
- aktualnymi zdjęciami twarzy i sylwetki
- wizytówką
- wiekiem
- wzrostem i wymiarami

sharedPost.text:
Notre culture, notre identité

Notre culture est le socle de notre identité. Elle vit à travers nos danses, nos rythmes, nos gestes, et la sagesse transmise de génération en génération.
Nos danses ne nous enseignent ni l’égoïsme ni la division, mais la loyauté, le respect et l’humilité.

Créer des ponts entre le Bénin et les autres nations, c’est offrir au monde la richesse de notre héritage. C’est faire rayonner nos rythmes, valoriser nos danses et affirmer notre place dans le concert des cultures.

Promouvoir la culture béninoise, ce n’est pas seulement la montrer, c’est aussi la comprendre, la respecter et la faire évoluer sans la trahir.
C’est une responsabilité, mais aussi un acte de fierté.

Vive la culture béninoise,
Vive nos racines,
Et que nos traditions continuent d’unir les peuples.

ADAC Ministère du Tourisme d’Haïti #benintourisme #benin WÀ NYILÓ culture BÉNIN

items.text:
# **CASTING CALL for a SHORT fantasy film - PAID roles- CHICAGO **

**PROJECT TITLE: Shed**

**PROJECT TYPE:** Short film Drama/Fantasy

**PRODUCTION COMPANY:** Searching Productions

**PRODUCTION TEAM: Writer/Director - Stephanie Jeter; EP - Lilly Wachowski**

**UNION STATUS: **Open to union and non-union actors -**PAID**

**PROJECT SYNOPSIS:** A couple’s harmonious relationship begins to unravel when the woman comes home to unexpectedly find a locked shed in her back yard and a husband who won’t tell her what’s inside.

**LOCATION**: Chicago, IL or surrounding area (exact location TBD)

**SHOOT DATES: June 1-June 7**

**ROLES:**

**These roles are for actors local to Chicagoland only**

**LAYLA** - woman, 30-39, Black: A high-achieving soror type whose curiosity might be getting the best of her. 

**RANDALL** - man, 30-39, Black, Asian, or Indigenous: An easygoing and sensitive man in the midst of an identity crisis. 

**LITTLE BOY** - boy, 8-11, Black, Asian, or Indigenous: Newly recovered from a battle with a life-threatening illness he tries his best to present a brave face for his family. (This is a non-speaking role.)

EXPECTED HOURS: TBD

ADDITIONAL COMPENSATION: Transportation reimbursement (capped)

**SUBMISSION DETAILS: Please send a head shot, resume, and reel (if available) to** **ShedFilmChi@gmail.com**, 

**SUBJECT:  ‘Cast submission -***** Role*****’.** 

**Please submit no later than April 29, 2026.**

**If you are invited to audition, we will provide sides and ask that you submit a self-taped audition.*

**CALL BACKS:** Callbacks and chemistry reads will be held between May 4th and May 7th in Chicago.

Follow us on: Instagram **shed.movie**

items.text:
***[Casting Call - Malay Kids Cooking Show]***

The Moving Visuals Co. is currently looking for kids to feature in an upcoming Malay Kids Cooking Show, "Ai Ai Cef 2"

**Details:**

**Film Period: **30th May 2026 - 11th June 2026. Kids are only needed for one day from period mentioned.

**Deadline**

Submit ASAP **(Best By end of April). **Contact the number below if more time is needed.

**Requirements**

1. Aged 7-12

2. Can converse in Malay

3. Fun & Out-Going

4. Have basic cooking skills. (Able to follow a recipe)

If interested do send in a recent photo and one minute video of introducing yourself with answers to the following questions. Video is to be done in Malay.

* What is your favourite food?

* What are the food(s) that you like to cook and why?

For more questions & submission of deliverables, do send in an email to production3@tmvc.sg & CC naqeaosman@tmvc.sg & casting@tmvc.sg

Feel free to contact me ( Iman ) at 9326 3626

Hey guys! New update regarding Lobo Oscuro; a short film that I’m acting in! Please read through the details carefully! No need to DM me!

CASTING CALL – Lobo Oscuro  (Short Film)

We are currently casting for an upcoming short film Lobo Oscuro, shooting near the Lake District (UK). All roles are paid, with travel, accommodation, and catering provided, plus IMDb credit.

Roles Available:

Adolpha

- Playing age: 25–29
- Height: 5’2”–5’5”
- Build: Slim
- Appearance: Tanned complexion, dark hair, brown eyes

Feroz

- Playing age: 25–29
- Height: 6ft+
- Build: Athletic
- Appearance: Long hair, facial hair

Crew Needed:

Camera Operator

- Experience operating professional film equipment preferred

Sound Recordist

- Experience with on-location sound recording required

Production Details:

- Project: Short Film
- Shooting Date: TBC
- Location: Near the Lake District, UK
- Compensation: Paid roles
- Travel, accommodation, and meals provided
- IMDb credit included

If interested, please submit your details, headshots (for cast), CV/portfolio (for crew), and availability via DM to Damien Lanceley!

We look forward to hearing from you!

items.text:
Playbox Productions – Seeking Collaborators for Upcoming Production!
> 🚨 **URGENT CALL** 🚨

**PLAYBOX PRODUCTIONS** is seeking production team members for an upcoming play in 2026 (to be announced).

This will be an **intimate, small-cast production**, focused on grounded, truthful work and a strong ensemble process.

> **TO APPLY:**
1. Send your Resume, and Website (if applicable) to:
**playboxpgh@gmail.com**
2. Include your availability for the production timeline, especially tech and performances.
3. And ask us any questions you may have!

> **Timeline:**
* Rehearsals: August 3 – September 13 (Strip District)
* Tech + Performances: September 14 – October 4 (Downtown Pittsburgh)

> All roles are **volunteer/contract-based**, with the intention of paying cast and crew per production. Compensation is **contingent on overall budget and ticket sales**.
> For reference, we were able to compensate our team during our sold-out run of *1984* in December 2025.
> Members of the Playbox community have worked with City Theatre, The Public Theater, The Pittsburgh Cultural Trust, Carnegie Mellon, Point Park, CLO, The Talent Group, and the 48 Hour Play Festival, to name a few. Please see roles below.

## **Currently Seeking:**

> **Production Manager**

Oversees the logistical and operational execution of the production from pre-production through closing.
* Coordinates schedules and timelines
* Manages logistics and communication
* Supports rehearsals and performances
* Acts as liaison between artistic and technical teams
> **Director**
* Develops and executes the artistic vision
* Leads rehearsals and guides performers
* Collaborates with designers and production staff
> **Stage Manager**
* Runs rehearsals and performances
* Tracks blocking, cues, and notes
* Maintains reports and team communication
> **Assistant Stage Managers (ASM)**
* Assist with rehearsal setup and breakdown
* Help track props, cues, and backstage needs
* Support communication and organization during rehearsals, tech, and shows
> **Designers (Set, Props Asst., Sound, & Lighting Designers)**

Collaborate with the director and team to shape the visual and technical elements of the production.

* Design and execute assigned elements
* Work closely with director and technical team
* Participate in meetings and tech rehearsals

## **Additional Roles We Are Seeking:**

> **Producers**

Support overall coordination, planning, and execution of the production alongside the Playbox team.
> **Construction / Set Builders**

Assist in building and assembling scenic elements to bring the set design to life.
> **Fight Director**

Design and safely choreograph staged physical moments and ensure actor safety.
> **Board Operators**

Run lighting or sound cues during performances.
> **Marketing Manager**

Leads the programming & promotion the production through social media, content, and audience outreach.

Thank You!

We look forward to your application and will be in touch shortly if interested via email or phone call.

**The Playbox Team, 2026**
Office #: (412) 282-3916
*[Website Currently Under Construction]*

items.text:
Norwegian Cruise Line is Seeking Acrobats/Gymnasts/Aerialists
NCLH Shows & Experiences is seeking male identifying seeking gymnasts, aerialists, acrobats, and tramp wall performers for the all-new productions aboard NCL's newest ship, the Norwegian LUNA.  

Please visit [https://nclgymnastsaerialistsacrobats.castingcrane.com/](https://nclgymnastsaerialistsacrobats.castingcrane.com/) to apply!

Mainstage productions include ELTON: A Celebration of Elton John is a concert/Vegas Residency-Style production centered around Elton John's musical legacy. The second mainstage production, HIKO, creates an exciting world by combining technology with unique circus acts and extraordinary movement. 

Original Creative Team: Katy Tate, Nappytabs, Whitney Paul Bezzant

Original Aerial Direction: AntiGravity Orlando

Rehearsals begin May 16, 2026

Onboard: $1,350/week ($5,850/month) 

All cast members are provided with a single occupancy cabin onboard. Cast will be Crew Members onboard with no cruise staff duties outside of the performance schedule. 

GYMNASTS: Any ethnicity. Male identifying. 5’8 to 6'2. Athletic, dynamic, versatile gymnasts with expertise in a wide range of skills including Tramp Wall, Chinese Pole, Straps, Bungee, Cube, and Acro. Must have upper body strength and physical presence. The ability to engage with an audience, embody a character, and tell a story is a must. Dance ability is a plus but not required.

AERIALISTS: Any ethnicity. Male identifying. 5’8 to 6'2. Athletic, dynamic, versatile gymnasts with expertise in a wide range of skills including Straps, Bungee, Cube, and Acro. Must have upper body strength and physical presence. The ability to engage with an audience, embody a character, and tell a story is a must. Dance training and understanding of body lines and positions are a huge plus. 

Must be 18 years or older to apply.

items.text:
Hey everyone I’m back!

We are still accepting tapes for my upcoming St. Joan period piece shot on 16mm film in Florida! More details in the shared post.

It’s not too late to audition for Joan but just letting potential applicants know, we have locked down on a potential candidate already unless someone better comes along.

We are mainly looking for more applicants for Isabelle Romée and the Nun, to give us more options.

We hope to hear from you soon!

sharedPost.text:
And the pivotal moment is here, the official casting call for St. Joan! Do not hesitate to reach out to our contacts if you want to apply for the listed parts (and don’t forget to share the GoFundMe!) and help bring this period piece to life. This will require a larger team than normal given the nature of the film, a period piece shot on film. 

Just a note that this is a historical and biographical film, so we are prioritizing actors who not only have studied these real historical figures and have done the necessary research to accurately reflect how they lived in life, but also somewhat resemble them in real life.

Share with anybody you think will be interested in applying for a part, or apply yourself if you match one of the positions. Filming is being done in Florida.

Non-union and at the moment, unpaid, until adequate funding is achieved via the GoFundMe. 

Catering and crafty will be provided, along with IMDb credits.

https://gofund.me/389fda838 

#indiefilm #indiefilmmaking #castingcall #castingnotice #biographicalfilm #stjoan #historicalfilm #16mmfilm #krasnogorsk3

items.text:
Most actors avoid this part of themselves… and it shows on camera.

Truth is — the moment you stop trying to look good and start laying yourself bare, everything changes.
That uncomfortable, messy, “ugly” side? That’s where the truth lives.
And truth is what casting actually buys into.

Vulnerability is the difference between average and the best.

Want to learn to be the best?
See the link in the caption 👉 https://linktr.ee/mattzina

#acting #screenacting #actingtips #actorsmindset #actingcoach

items.summary:
Most actors avoid this part of themselves… and it shows on camera.

Truth is — the moment you stop trying to look good and start laying yourself bare, everything changes.
That uncomfortable, messy, “ugly” side? That’s where the truth lives.
And truth is what casting actually buys into.

Vulnerability is the difference between average and the best.

Want to learn to be the best?
See the link in the caption 👉 https://linktr.ee/mattzina

#acting #screenacting #actingtips #actorsmindset #actingcoach
items.title: Most actors avoid this part of themselves… and it shows on camera.

items.text:
Thinking about getting into voiceover but not based in Dublin?
We’re often asked about online options by people living in remote areas or those who simply can’t make it to an in-person class. So this June, we’re opening up our Online Introduction to Voiceover with PBL Voiceover Coach. Ireland's most highly rated Voiceover Coach. 

This affordable session is designed to give you a real, honest impression of what it takes to work in professional voiceover. No fluff, just practical insight, guided exercises, and direction from an industry professional.

What you’ll get:

A clear understanding of how the voiceover industry works

Live coaching and performance feedback

Tips on script interpretation and delivery

Insight into recording setups and audio quality

A chance to ask questions and get personalised guidance

If you have a USB microphone, great, it’ll help you get even more out of the session. But it’s not essential. You can still take part and learn a huge amount without one.

Places are deliberately kept very limited to ensure everyone gets proper attention and feedback.

If you’ve been curious about voiceover, this is your chance to step in and try it properly.

Book your place now:

https://pbl-dmd-events.indiestand.com/products/online-introduction-to-voiceover-class-with-pbl-voiceover-coach/

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'PBL VOICEOVER COACH & DEMOS ONLINE INTRODUCTION tO PROFESSIONAL VOICEOVER 1 김'

Szukamy kobiet i mężczyzn do udziału w nagraniu reklamy dla kliniki psychologicznej w Poznaniu.  

📍 Lokalizacja: Poznań  

📅 Termin: niedziela, 26 kwietnia  

💸 Stawka: 200 zł / godz.  

Szukamy osób swobodnie czujących się przed kamerą, z naturalną energią i autentycznością – zależy nam na prawdziwych emocjach, nie „sztywnym” aktorstwie.

items.text:
NOW CASTING:

Looking for an elderly 70-80 year old man to play the role of Grandpa Nick. He should have a look similar to of Robert De Niro- good physic, olive skin, a Mediterranean / Greek look. Very ethnic look. This role does not have any dialogue and would be to shoot one short scene.

scene. 

Also looking to cast a couple female actresses in the 30-40 age range to be background actors in one short scene. 

Synopsis:

Unforgettable is a story of a woman’s desperate attempt to get pregnant and on her journey, gets an unexpected message from her beloved Grandfather from the afterlife.

And how the signs along the way of her journey, whispered to her, what gifts would be put in her path. A true story of one woman’s synchronicity and love. 

PLEASE NOTE: this is a student film, it is no pay but all actors will receive IMDb credits. 

FILMING IN THE LOS ANGELES AREA.

If you are interested in being apart of this project please send me or @bellavlasis a DM!

#castingcalls #shortfilm #actorswanted #castingkids #castingfilm

And how the signs along the way of her journey, whispered to her, what gifts would be put in her path. A true story of one woman’s synchronicity and love. 

PLEASE NOTE: this is a student film, it is no pay but all actors will receive IMDb credits. 

FILMING IN THE LOS ANGELES AREA.

If you are interested in being apart of this project please send me or @bellavlasis a DM!

#castingcalls #shortfilm #actorswanted #castingkids #castingfilm
items.title: NOW CASTING:

items.text:
**CASTING CALL - COLORADO FEATURE FILM**

DURANGO SEEMS LIKE A GREAT PLACE TO DIE

*After a heartbreaking divorce, Ezra begrudgingly joins his bohemian mother on a road trip across Colorado to help her die.*

It’s a very funny movie, with serious undertones. And at its core – it’s a mother/son story. Our story is centered around Medical Aid in Dying and explores the relationships that really impact and shape our adult lives.

Writer/Directors: AJ Campli & Matt Bruggeman

Executive Producers: AJ Campli, Matt Bruggeman, Boulder Media House, Tyler Sapp, Chloe Chamberlain & Jill Coats

Producer: Tyler Sapp

Casting Director: Chloe Chamberlain

Shooting Dates: 7/1 - 7/14 & 8/14 - 8/21

Locations: Denver, CO / Boulder, CO / Durango, CO

**Roles:**

**Sonia ***Lead*

65-72 / Female

Sonia is a 67 year old free spirit who’s spent the last 30 years or so kicking it around Boulder, Colorado after she graduated from Naropa. She’s a sex positive, free wheeling bohemian, who spent the majority of the early 70s trying to relive the 60s. Lots of acid and counter-cultural literature, Grateful Dead shows and the like, until she became a mom. That’s Sonia’s past though. We meet Sonia in the present day; after the death of her beloved husband, Michael, she has plenty of alone time to look back on her full life before her adult son, Ezra, moves back in. Sonia purports strength and wisdom, but really, she seems to be grieving the loss of youth. As she looks at her mortality squarely, she decides to take things into her own hands, and she sets out to end her own life through Medical Aid in Dying, even though she doesn’t exactly qualify…
* Rate: ~$8,000 Project Flat
* Duration: ~18 Days on Set + Rehearsal
* Shooting Dates: 7/1 - 7/14 & 8/14 - 8/21

**Ezra ***Lead*

30-36 / Male

Ezra is a 34 year old man who – more often than not – has something to say about, well, everything. He has an MFA in Creative Writing & PhD in Postmodern Literature from Denver University, and he’s got a whole bunch of opinions on what makes up a valuable opinion. He’s the kind of guy who’s quick to comment on why a certain book or film is low brow, and he's hellbent on being the smartest guy in the room – even if it’s at the expense of those around him. He’s a “writer” but really, lately, he’s a professor that writes. We meet Ezra at quite the inflection point in his life – his wife has left him, he’s moved back in with his mother (whom he has an irrationally short fuse with) and he’s recently been placed on sabbatical for the upcoming semester. Ezra’s looking for answers, even if he won’t admit it until he absolutely must.
* Rate: ~$8,000 Project Flat
* Duration: ~18 Days on Set + Rehearsal
* Shooting Dates: 7/1 - 7/14 & 8/14 - 8/21

**Hayduke ***Supporting*

65-75 / Male

Hayduke is a 70 year old male. Ex-hippie, Grateful Dead fan, very counter cultural. Strong comedic skills preferred.

* Rate: ~$1,500 Project Flat
* Duration: ~3 Days on Set + Rehearsal
* Shooting Dates: 7/12 - 7/14

_______________________________________
Thank you for your interest in our project! Please submit here:
[[[https://forms.gle/xcwVATkU5L7T11Hs5](https://forms.gle/xcwVATkU5L7T11Hs5)](https://forms.gle/xcwVATkU5L7T11Hs5)](https://forms.gle/xcwVATkU5L7T11Hs5)

Please keep an eye out for more roles and updates in the coming weeks. Cheers!

sharedPost.text:
Accountability is taking ownership of actions and finding solutions, while self-blame is a shame-based focus on guilt that often paralyzes personal growth. 

Accountability focuses on "What can I learn?" while self-blame asks "Why am I so bad?".

Shifting from self-blame to accountability involves self-compassion, admitting mistakes, and taking action, rather than internalizing shame. #IBM #IBlameMyself 

https://youtu.be/7WHsPeAu7sk?si=Z1jHRwlpPZSV6yYZ

items.text:
Stuck on your next step in Hollywood?

Most actors chase one-off bookings. I architect lasting careers and change destinies.

I’m Coach Kent—a former NYC prosecutor who now builds case-winning performances as a SAG-AFTRA actor of 40+ years. I’m also Hollywood’s branding architect (18+ years transforming careers), a national headline stand-up comedian, and the author of three authoritative acting books.

My unorthodox path is your advantage:

· The Legal Strategist: A former prosecutor and online law professor who dissects scripts like a trial case and has been the legal expert for major music videos.
· The Corporate Trainer: I’ve drilled commanding presence into leaders at giants like Blue Cross Blue Shield.
· The Showman: From national comedy stages to a Dr. Phil celebrity look-alic, I master persona and impact.
· The Destiny Architect: For over 18 years, I haven't just coached actors. I've coached kids, couples, families, doctors, lawyers, judges, and celebrities—packaging unique personas into undeniable brands, backed by over 450 testimonials.

I don't just teach technique. I provide the strategic fusion of law, performance, and marketing that builds empires. I transform raw potential into a booked, working professional with commanding presence across every platform.

Ready to change your destiny? Send me a DM with the word “DESTINY.”

Let’s build your empire.

KentKasper.net..

items.text:
**Actors with or without prior experience are welcome.**

You may apply even without a CV or filmography. Just send your recent photos (headshot, side profile, full body) and basic information (age, height, contact details).

‼️ **CASTING CALL FOR A SHORT FILM** ‼️

📍 Shoot: June 2026 | Cavite

⸻

📌 **ROLES:**

**MATT / THEO**

Male, 16–17 years old (screen age)

⸻

📌 **SUBMISSION DETAILS:**

Send your:

* Recent photos (headshot, side profile, full body)
* Basic information (name, age, height, contact details)
* Sample works / CV / reel (**only** if available)

📧 **projectpagkislap@gmail.com**

🗓 Deadline: April 24, 11:59 PM

**Shortlisted applicants will be contacted for audition materials and further instructions.**

Talent fee, food, and transportation will be provided.

⸻

For inquiries, please contact via email only.

items.text:
NOW CASTING:
Looking to cast a couple female actresses in the 30-40 age range to be background actors in one short scene. 

Looking for different actors of all ages to volunteer to be background actors in one short scene filming in the Los Angeles area June 30th.

Synopsis:

Unforgettable is a story of a woman’s desperate attempt to get pregnant and on her journey, gets an unexpected message from her beloved Grandfather from the afterlife.

And how the signs along the way of her journey, whispered to her, what gifts would be put in her path. A true story of one woman’s synchronicity and love. 

PLEASE NOTE: this is a student film, it is no pay but all actors will receive IMDb credits. 

Filming in the Los Angeles / SFV area. 

If you are interested in being apart of this project please send me a DM!

#castingcalls #shortfilm #actorswanted #castingkids #castingfilm

items.text:
CASTING CALL: New Project Shooting this August!

Project Title: Shades of Identity

Type: independent film

Be part of a powerful story that explores the raw realities of colorism, sisterhood, and the courage to be seen. We are seeking 30+ diverse extras of all backgrounds and styles to help bring the world of Shades of Identity to life. This is an unpaid project, but it is a major opportunity to gain on-set experience, secure high-quality footage for your reel/portfolio, and earn an official film credit. The roles we need to fill.

We are officially casting for an upcoming project and would love to see your talent! Since we are keeping things streamlined, auditions will be held entirely online. WE SHOOT IN THE BOSTON’S AND SOMERVILLE AREA.

The Details
Shoot Date: August 2026

How to Apply: Choose a monologue for the role you’re interested in, record your self-tape, and email it directly to me!

Character Breakdown
We are looking for the following roles:

Lena (16–23): Black/Dark-skinned.

Maya (16–23): Black/Light-skinned.

Ashley (16–23): Plus-size.

Erica (16–23)

Theresa (16–23)

Aaron (16–23): The gay best friend; charismatic and loyal.

Tyla (16–23): The "mean girl" with a colorist attitude.

Camilla (16–23): Tyla’s sidekick.

Mr. Jones (45–55): The father figure; grounded and protective.

Therapist (35–55): Calm, professional, and observant.

Ready to Submit?
Please send your video auditions to: bmg30genzpub@gmail.com 

Tag a friend who would be perfect for one of these roles! We can't wait to see your submissions. 🎥🌟

sharedPost.text:
The cards have spoken - Nocturne is expanding…🌙✨

We are Nocturne, a theatrical progressive metal band conjured in Liverpool, UK, drawing from Tool, Ghost, Dream Theater, Genesis and Rush.

We are seeking a drummer and guitarist to help expand our sound.

You should be:
• Experienced in live performance
• Able to commit to weekly rehearsals in Liverpool and/or Salford
• Comfortable in theatrical performance, costume, character, stage presence
• Creatively engaged and ready to add to a growing and established sound
• Professional, reliable and committed ✨

If this feels like you, send us a DM or email with a video of you playing (10 extra points if it’s dance of eternity) 

#liverpoolmusicians #metalbanduk #progmetal #joinaband #drummerwanted

items.text:
!!! PILNE !!!

Do kwietniowego odcinka serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) wciąż poszukuję 3 osób do następujacych ról:

1. Mikołaj Rudnicki (23) – Z bogatej rodziny, typ bananka, co myśli, ze zawsze dostanie to czego chce. Urażona duma, kompleksy. Studiuje psychologie. Prace licencjacką sobie kupuje, ale musi zaliczyć praktyki w ośrodku. Umie grać dobrze wychowanego. KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY

Daty: 27., 28. kwietnia i 01. maja
Stawka: 1800 zł netto za całość

2. Filip Grodzki (26) – pewny siebie, przekonany o słuszności polowania na pedofili, należy do grupy tropiącej pedofili, razem z Krzysztofem organizuje akcję pobicia Marcina. Chętnie tatuaże.

Data: 30. kwietnia
Stawka: 600 zł netto

3.Martyna (17) – Sierota, która uciekała z domów tymczasowych (miała pecha do opiekunów, przez co jest nieufna do innych i ma mało znajomych) W Igim się zakochała. Koniecznie ładna, atrakcyjna, dlatego spodobała się też Rudnickiemu. Do końca zakochana w Igim. Top, spodnie i rozpinany, luźny sweter 

Data: 27. kwietnia i 01. maja
Stawka: 1200 zł netto

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe, TYLKO od osób które nie grały w Gliniarzach w 2026 roku.

Chętne osoby zapraszam do wysyłania pilnych zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

items.text:
Aktorka
Cześć, szukam aktorki do krótkometrażowej etiudy fabularnej w klimacie sc-fi. To opowieść o utracie, w której dwie bliźniacze siostry rozdzielone zostały w przestrzeni kosmicznej. 

Wymagania: Aktorka z dłuższymi, brązowymi włosami, wiek: 18 - 25 lat 

🎥 Lokalizacja: Warszawa

💰Oferta non-profit

📅 Termin: druga połowa maja (16/17 maja lub 30/31) 

🍽️ Zapewniony posiłek na planie

📩 Zgłoszenia wraz z wizytówką i aktualnymi zdjęciami proszę wysyłać na priv

items.title: Aktorka

items.text:
SZUKAM DŹWIĘKOWCA NA PLAN 🔊
📍Płusy, woj. lubelskie

🎥Film krótkometrażowy / etiuda szkolna (non-profit)
📆 22-24 maja 2026 - 2-3 dni zdjęciowe

Szukam doświadczonego dźwiękowca, który zadba o najwyższą jakość dźwięku z planu podczas zdjęć.

Jestem studentką AMA Film Academy. W dniach 22-24 maja odbędą się zdjęcia do mojego krótkometrażowego dramatu z elementami grozy i slow cinema. Akcja filmu rozgrywa się na polskiej wsi w latach 90., w sierpniu. Bohaterkami filmu są: 11-letnia dziewczynka, jej babcia oraz 13-letnia koleżanka. Dialogów jest niewiele - 4 bardzo krótkie i 1 dłuższy.

Projekt jest nieodpłatny i bez zapewnionego noclegu, dlatego najlepiej, aby dźwiękowiec był z okolic lokacji filmu. Oferuję zwrot kosztów dojazdu oraz jedzenie na planie. Serdecznie zapraszam do współpracy w kameralnej atmosferze i w doświadczonym zespole młodych filmowców z pasją.

Proszę o zgłoszenia w komentarzu pod postem. Odezwę się w wiadomości prywatnej i przedstawię szczegóły projektu.

Poniżej moodboard do filmu.

attachments.ocrText: Może być zdjęciem przedstawiającym tekst

items.text:
[KRAKÓW]
Poszukuję aktorki w wieku 20-25 LAT

Projekt to kampania społeczna na temat zdrowia- scenki aranżowanej sondy ulicznej wśród kobiet. Materiały w formie krótkich reels na social media.

📍 Nagrania: 23.04 (czwartek)
godziny: ok. 11:30-16:00

Stawka: 800 zł netto

Produkcja nie przewiduje zwrotu kosztów logistycznych.

❗️Proszę o zgłaszanie się osób, które na pewno mogą być w tym terminie i tych godzinach w Krakowie i które akceptują wszystkie warunki.

Zgłoszenie zawierające:
- zdjęcie portretowe i zdjęcie sylwetki
- krótkie video z mówieniem do kamery (np. wizytówka)
przesyłać na adres: [casting@krakrafilms.com](mailto:casting@krakrafilms.com)

sharedPost.text:
Do Niemieckiego serialu sensacyjnego „8 BILLION” poszukujemy statystów z Poznania lub okolic. To będą pojedyncze sceny, więc plany zdjęciowe nie będą trwały długo. Zdjęcia w Poznaniu w dniach od 28 kwietnia do 2 maja. Wynagrodzenie 201 zł brutto (189 zł na rękę).

KOGO SZUKAMY?
Na wtorek 28.04:
- Postawnych, wysokich mężczyzn do roli ochroniarzy
- Panów którzy wcielą się w postacie porywaczy/przestępców
- Kierowcy z prawem jazdy
- Lokaja/Kamerdynera najlepiej o szpakowatych włosach
- Kelnera
- Kobiet i mężczyzn - klientów restauracji

Na środę 29.04:
- Postawnych, mężczyzn do roli ochroniarzy
- Kobietę i mężczyznę – pracowników biurowych
- Kobietę, pacjentkę w szpitalu
- Kierowcy z prawem jazdy

Na czwartek 30.04
- 20 kobiet i mężczyzn którzy wcielą się w rolę dziennikarzy

Na piątek  1.05
- Ochroniarza

Na sobotę 2.05
- Kierowcy z prawem jazdy

Na zgłoszenia czekamy do piątku 24.04 do godziny 9:00 rano.
Formularz do zgłoszenia oraz link do trailela w komentarzu

media.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'n.Π Do serialu poszukujemy dorosłych Statystów- kobiet i mężczyzn Zdjęcia w dniach 28.04-2.05.2026 w Poznaniu. Szczegóły w opisie B N >>> link do zgłoszenia w komentarzu <<< 8'

items.title: Do Niemieckiego serialu sensacyjnego „8 BILLION” poszukujemy statystów z Poznania lub okolic

items.text:
**WARSZAWA**

**30 kwietnia (czwartek)**

** **

*Proszę o nie zgłaszanie się panów, którzy już wysłali zgłoszenie*.

** **

**OSTATNI DZIEŃ I OSTATNIA SZANSA, ABY WZIĄĆ UDZIAŁ W PLANIE FILMU „KOSMONAUTA”**

 

Szukamy Statystów, **MĘŻCZYZN ok. 20-65 lat** do filmu fabularnego osadzonego w latach 70tych o znanym Polaku.

 

**Stawka 200 zł gotówką po planie (dzień zdjęciowy + charakteryzacja)**

** **

Charakteryzacja 28 lub 29.04 – termin do potwierdzenia

 

Zgłoszenia poproszę na adres: **ewelina.wika@podtytulem.pl**

W tytule: **KS 30**

W treści: imię i nazwisko, wiek, nr telefonu, miejscowość

items.text:
🎭 Drama Cover Needed! 🎭
We’re on the lookout for an experienced and energetic Drama Teacher to lead a fun, engaging session with young performers. If you love bringing scripts to life, guiding talent, and creating a supportive, creative environment—this could be for you!

🗓 25th April 2026

⏰ 10:00 AM – 1:00 PM

📍 Woodford Green (IG8 7NA)

💷 £75.00

You’ll be leading warm-ups, working on pre-prepared material, and helping students develop their performances with confidence and creativity.

✨ Ready to inspire the next generation of performers?

Send your headshot, CV, and DBS to info@sorellelondon.co.uk

#DramaTeacher #TheatreJobs #ActingCoach #PerformingArts #DramaOpportunity #TeachingArtists #LondonJobs

items.text:
Horror Web Series Casting Call in Thornton CO
CASTING CALL - Micro Vertical Found Footage Horror Web Series

Title: "CHAPTER 0"

Logline: A few weeks bedore a new horror escape room's grand opening, unusual experiences cause a paranoid employee to be concerned about the real-life maniac whose grisly murders inspired the game.

Genre: Found Footage Horror

Format: 10 (2-3 minutes each) vertical webisodes

Writer/Directors: Jerrod D. Brito (https://www.sharpspoonpictures.com/about-us.html) & Chris Guite

Executive Producer: Tim Carillo

Shooting Dates: A few flexible shooting nights between May 1st and May 30th

Locations: Thornton, CO

Roles:

RILEY (Lead)

Age: 18-22

Description: A new hire who doesn't enjoy horror, but took a Game Master job at a nearby escape room for the flexible hours and the ability to do homework there at night while waiting for deliveries in the weeks before the escape room opens. Riley is easily spooked, enjoys making vlogs, and though he/she/they isn't afraid of ghosts, nothing chills Riley more than real-life killers.

* These shorts will be roughly scripted, but in the spirit of found footage films, we are primarily looking for natural influencer-type personalities who are able to ad-lib when necessary.

Rate: Let's talk about it.

Duration: 1 month-ish (only a few shoot days, very flexible.)

Shooting Dates: 3-4 flexible nights between May 1st and May 30th, up to 2 hours each.

ROBERT (Cameo)

Age: ???

Description: It could be a tall man in all black, lurking in the shadows, or it could just be our imaginations, our sleepless eyes playing tricks on us. Only our editor knows for sure...

Rate: Let's talk about it.

Duration: 1 month-ish (only a few shoot days, very flexible.)

Shooting Dates: 2-3 flexible nights between May 1st and May 30th, up to 2 hours each.

AUDITION INFO: If you're interested in these roles, please send an email, headshot, resume, your desired fee, and any relevant reels or samples to jerrodbrito@gmail.com with the subject "CHAPTER 0" for consideration. Selected performers will be asked to submit a short video audition based on a prompt.

Thank you!

items.text:
CASTING CALL

Title: Where You Came From

Genre: Comedy

Logline: Mauri is leaving for Africa... her mom isn't so sure about that...

Role: Frank. Between late forties and early sixties. Frank is a little bit of a mess, but he is Mauri's father through and through. He's supportive, unprofessional, and maybe a little hungover.

Production Company: This is a UCCS capstone film by Joseph Impellitteri with Christian Winkler and Onyx Riccelli producing

Production Type: Student Film

Contact Information: email me at jvitoimp@gmail.com or text me at 859-444-7502

Run Time: Short (~10 min)

Compensation: Paid ($25)

Union Status: Non-Union (not a hard line though)

Audition Information: Reach out to me; all auditions will be digital

Shooting Schedule: May 3rd, all day (12 hour shoot). Tentatively, 7 am-7 pm

Filming Location: Old North End in Colorado Springs (near downtown)

Project Description: I think the script is funny (bias). If you like comedy, message me!

If you need an angsty teen anywhere in there… hit me up! 😂

CASTING CALL 

Project: Awkward Silence 

Genre: Comedy, Love, Drama

This short film is a non intimate love story about Caleb, a Man with Deafness that is starting in the Dating scene. 

Roles Needed: 

Caleb - Lead (You do not need to have Hearing Loss to play this character)

Lyd - Supporting Actress 

Looking for a Male and Female Actors preferably 20-30 Years old. 

Date: Monday April 20th

Call Time for LEAD Actor 9:30 AM - (EST) 4:30PM

Call Time for LYD actress 1:30PM - (EST) 4:30PM

Location: Littleton and Aurora 

If Interested please text me @ 720 670 9172 or Email me @ jkwollan@gmail.com and I will send you Script! 

Please Include your Headshot if you have one and any experience you may have on a Film Set. Thanks so much!

This Role will most likely be UNPAID. Contact me for details regardless.

items.text:
Die mobile „Ferrari Club Deutschland e.V. Hausband“ stellt sich vor ☝️
🟪 Kabellos Mobil Band 🟪

sharedPost.text:
Der Ferrari Club Deutschland

Im Juni 2010 lernten wir uns auf Sylt kennen!
Seit dem verbindet uns eine vertrauensvolle Beziehung und Zusammenarbeit. 
Ich bin stolz und glücklich so einen Kunden über so eine lange Zeit zu bedienen und denke es ist eine Art „Ritterschlag“,  der uns in unserer Szene auszeichnet. 

Da ist einfach dieses spezielle Vertrauen, dass man immer wieder in uns setzt. 

Nun waren wir wieder einmal mit den Ferraristi unterwegs. 

Um 16 Uhr starteten wir am Bootsanleger an Kameha Grand Hotel in Bonn auf einem Rheinschiff in Richtung Kölner Altstadt. 

Nach einem Fußweg von 1,4 km kamen wir im „Sünner im Walfisch“ an, wo wir den FERRARI CLUB bis um 23:00 Uhr bespielten. 

🟪 Kabellos 2.0 🟪 hat gestern mit der neuen Besetzung, der überarbeiteten Song Auswahl und neuer energetischer Präsenz einen weiteren Meilenstein in Reihen des Ferrari Clubs Deutschland e.V. gesetzt. 

Solche Kunden fühlen, sehen und verstehen, dass man im Einsatz vor Ort MEHR als Musik bietet ☝️ 

Die Kritik und Empathie, die man 
🟪 Kabellos 2.0 🟪 entgegen brachte, suchte seinesgleichen!

Solche Feedbacks sorgen bestimmt mit dafür, dass man nach 40 Jahren professionellem, musikalischen Status und fast 5000 gespielten Auftritten immer noch für seine Sache brennt, wie am ersten Tag 😍👍

#kabellosmobilband
#ferrariclubdeutschland
#galaband
#mobilemusik
#professionalmusicians

items.text:
🎥 We're looking for people to share their mental health struggles and experiences for a short feature documentary being sent to multiple film festivals such as, Sundance, Tiff, etc.
We want these stories to be impactful and meaningful for the audience.
All stories can be shot at home with a cellphone or any recording devices.

Record a raw and impactful footage talking about a mental health struggle you have battled or are currently battling. Don't forget to answer the How, What, Where & When questions when telling your journey!

Footage must be less than 30 minutes.
Must be recorded in landscape mode.
Must be able to show vulnerability & real emotions (no acting).
Must be TRUE stories.
Must start the video as if you're adjusting the camera.
Must receive submissions before September 1st
Non-union, not compensated

TO SUBMIT :
Send your name, age, a short bio, country, city, your mental health struggle, a headshot, a full body shot, and your video to
cloudzillainquiries@gmail.com

*optional : send your social media handle(s).
We look forward to listening to your stories and creating powerful impacts to help others who may be struggling.

items.text:
I’m casting people in Georgia for a short cinematic YouTube project.

I’m looking for someone who is currently experiencing or reflecting on one of the following:

a dream or idea they haven’t started
a life transition or change
a creative block or reset
something personal they’ve been sitting with

Filming will take place within the next 1–2 weeks and will take about 1–2 hours total. Location will be local in Georgia and kept simple/comfortable.

This is an unpaid, passion-based creative project. Selected participants will receive a cinematic video feature, a copy of their final edited segment, and will be part of a storytelling series they can share once released (with permission).

No acting experience needed — just openness and comfort being on camera.
If you’re interested, please DM or email jcut22media@gmail.com 

You can also submit a short form here:

https://forms.gle/7W27ByJRQMp6iT3j9

items.text:
CASTING CALL – Energy Drink Spec! (OC/LA, Paid) 

Currently casting for (3) youthful, female leads for an energy drink spec for a growing production company. 

The shoot (non-union) will be in Los Angeles/Orange County, sometime in May, with a day rate of $50. Along with compensation, the actors will get some BTS & additional photos + videos for  their social media/reel/portfolio.  

ISO: 

(1) – Beach Runner: clean, natural, everyday, fit/athletic girl-next-door type of character, this position will require some light jogging/running 
(1) – Pilates/Yoga Practitioner: quiet confidence, natural vibe, fit/athletic, disciplined
(1) – Party Attendee: Free Spirited, extroverted, high energy, bright smile,bold-ish vibe, but still maintaining the clean, athletic/fit look, etc. 

* Each role will have different skills/requirements

If interested, please submit your: 
- Contact information
- Dates you’re available in May
- Headshot, full body shot, reel
- Resume
to riannamamitag.prod@gmail.com ! 

Please follow the subject line format of: First Last Name - Role(s) - Spec 

Looking forward to your submissions & connecting with you! Please submit your profile & related materials by 5/1 .

items.text:
A Student Film

*Meet THE MANDELAS*
A 90s-style comedy about a family, a girlfriend, and a secret that won't stay hidden. In a world of new beginnings, Thabo is looking for a way out, the Reverend is looking for the truth, and Lerato is just looking for a nice dinner.

Dinner is served. Confession is mandatory. 

We’re looking for: 
Young Male (20s)
Young Woman (20s)
Older Man (40+)
Older Woman (30+)

Able to speak Xhosa

For more information. Contacts are on the poster🙏

🎬 CASTING CALL: IDENTICAL TWINS (GIRLS, 10–12)

We’re scouting identical twin girls across South Africa for an upcoming paid feature film shooting in Cape Town (June–September 2026).

✨ Requirements:
• Identical twin girls
• Ages 10–12
• Mixed race / ethnically ambiguous look
• Must have a valid SA or international passport (travel to Belgium required)

This is an exciting international opportunity for young talent to be part of a major production 🌍

📩 To apply:
Email: studio@zestcasting.com

Include:
• Recent photos of both twins
• Names & ages
• Contact details
• Where they are based

⏰ Deadline: 4 May 2026

Tag parents, friends, schools, or agents who might know the perfect twins! 

#twins #southafrica #casting #featurefilm #capetowncasting #zestcasting

I’ll be at the Wessagussett Wetland and Woodland - Historic Conservation Site on Saturday, April 25th 9-12 for the Town Wide Clean Up.

I’ll be back with the crew on Saturday, May 2 for our Annual Earth Day Festivities from 10am to 5pm!

We will be doing Invasive Plant removal - digging up Garlic Mustard!!  

Hope to see you there!!
